zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Castilla於1355年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德托德希利亞斯時，她的父親Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon21歲，母親Maria De Padilla21歲。她於1372年7月11日與Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York在英國賀特福爾賀特福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1392年12月23日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾金斯 明日香享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾金斯 明日香。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Castilla于1355年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德托德希利亞斯时，她的父亲Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon21岁，母亲Maria De Padilla21岁。她于1372年7月11日与Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York在英国賀特福爾賀特福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1392年12月23日在英国英格兰賀特福爾金斯 明日香享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾金斯 明日香。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Castilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfredo, Carlos, Raul, Sergio, Jesus, Jorge, Pablo, Ruben, Blanca, Elido, Francisco, Guillermo.
Spanish: habitational name from Castile (Spanish Castilla), a region in central Spain. The name derives from the many castles in the region. This surname is also found in southern France.
History: As an independent kingdom between the 10th and 15th centuries, Castile formed the largest power in the Iberian peninsula.

variants.name: Castiglia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonino, Benedetto, Carmine, Francesco, Gaetano, Gennaro, Giacomo, Giuseppe, Ignazio.
Italian: habitational name from Castile (Italian Castiglia) in central Spain (see Castilla ).

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Castilla was born in 1355, in Tordesillas, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spain, her father, Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon, was 21 and her mother, Maria De Padilla, was 21. She married Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York on 11 July 1372, in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 23 December 1392, in Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Castilla est née en 1355, à Tordesillas, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Maria De Padilla, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York le 11 juillet 1372, à Hertford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 décembre 1392, à Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Castilla 1355 in Tordesillas, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon 21 und ihre Mutter Maria De Padilla 21. Sie hat am 11. Juli 1372 in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. Dezember 1392 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Castilla è nata il nel 1355 nel Tordesillas, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spagna, sua padre, Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Maria De Padilla, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York il 11 luglio 1372, nel Hertford, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 dicembre 1392, nel Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Castillaが1355年にスペインカスティラ イ レoンヴァラドリドトルデシラスで生まれた時，父Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leonは21歳，母Maria De Padillaは21歳であった。1372年7月11日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードでEdmund of Langley 1st Duke of Yorkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1392年12月23日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアキングズ ラングリーで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアキングズ ラングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Morales de Campos, Valladolid, Castile a: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 발라도리드 모라일스 데 캄푸스
ko.Burgos, Provincia de Burgos, Castille an: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 버고스 버고스
ko.Tordesillas, Valladolid, Castilla y León: 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 발라도리드 토르데시라스
ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Castilla(이)가 1355년 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 발라도리드 토르데시라스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria De Padilla(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1372년 7월 11일 영국 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에서 Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1392년 12월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 킨그스 랭글리에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 킨그스 랭글리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Castilla nasceu em 1355, em Tordesillas, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Maria De Padilla, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York em 11 de julho de 1372, em Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de dezembro de 1392, em Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Castilla родилась в 1355 г. в местности тордесиллас, валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания, её отцу по имени Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Maria De Padilla, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York 11 июля 1372 г. в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 декабря 1392 г. в местности кингс лангли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности кингс лангли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella de Castilla nació en 1355, en Tordesillas, Valladolid, Castilla y León, España, su papá, Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Maria De Padilla, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York el 11 de julio de 1372, en Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de diciembre de 1392, en Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
